warnings.reason: App Launcher search combobox not present in Playwright aria_snapshot (shadow DOM). getByRole() pierces shadow DOM at runtime. If this fails, try page.locator('input[role="combobox"]') as an alternative.

App Launcher result items not present in Playwright aria_snapshot (shadow DOM). Playwright getByRole() should resolve them at runtime. Verify the option role matches the SF App Launcher search result DOM.
